metadata.note: Illustrative intervention sites along the Jukskei River in Alexandra, Johannesburg. Geometries are approximate placeholders and will be confirmed from the SUNCASA data catalogue during Inception.

properties.name: Alexandra riverbank rehabilitation
properties.summary: Debris removal and bank stabilisation along a cleared reach of the Jukskei.

properties.name: Community tree planting corridor
properties.summary: Street and open space tree planting to expand shade and cool the neighbourhood.

properties.name: Riparian restoration reach
properties.summary: Indigenous species planting to restore habitat and filter runoff.

properties.name: Water Warriors work site
properties.summary: Local women and youth employed in cleanup and restoration activities.

properties.name: Jukskei intervention corridor
properties.summary: Primary SUNCASA intervention corridor along the Jukskei through Alexandra.
